description: The image displays a false-colour infrared (FCIR) satellite view of an unspecified rural or semi-rural area, featuring a complex pattern of land cover. Agricultural fields are the dominant feature, rendered in various shades of red and green/turquoise, indicating different types or vigour of vegetation. Darker red hues signify higher vegetation activity. Numerous yellow lines delineate individual land parcels or field boundaries, some of which contain numeric identifiers such as "1118", "604", "1119", "605", "606", "607", and "608". Linear blue features represent infrastructure, including a prominent multi-lane highway in the upper central part and smaller roads winding through the landscape. Clusters of white and light grey pixels indicate buildings and settlements, often adjacent to the agricultural fields. No scale bar, compass, or legend is present.
